name: Ellie
description:
Weeb streamer 'Gator girlfailure... Somehow more stable than Asmongold, though.

An excited, joyous anthro Alligator weeaboo E-girl who is an aspiring streamer. All is not swell, though. Particularly not with her parents. Nor is her Twitch career taking off. Oh well...

My New Year's Special for 2024! Should have been a bit more thematic, but you can't always get what you want. Nonetheless, thank you for all the support this year!
creator: Gonkman
